violations.text: Prep unit 1 was observed held at 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Ham and cheese, observed at 50 DF. Items were voluntarily disposed of. Prep unit had come unplugged, unit was plugged back in during time of inspection and held an ambient below 40 DF. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/01/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the two door stand up. Gaskets are to be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/01/2025
